script:
the work is the way.


the work is the way.


Every morning before Rome woke, Marcus Aurelius wrote.
Not to be read.
Not to be remembered.
Because the work was the only way he knew to be himself.


the work is the way.


Last night you swore you would finish the OATH spec without doomscrolling first.

That is still true.
It is true right now.
It is the only thing that is true right now.


Open the laptop.
Close every other tab.
One tab.
The spec.
Nothing else exists until that is done.


the work is the way.


Not after coffee.
Not after one scroll.
Not after you feel ready.

Now.


Begin.

  "script": "the work is the way.


the work is the way.


Every morning before the city woke, Marcus Aurelius sat with a candle and wrote what he owed the day.
No feed. No noise. Just the page.


the work is the way.


Finish the OATH spec without doomscrolling first.

That is what you swore.
That is what this morning is for.


Open the laptop.
Close every other tab.


the work is the way.


Move.",

}
